headline: Why Lumentum (LITE) Could Benefit From AI Optical Networking Demand as Co-Packaged Optics Adoption Accelerates
summary: Lumentum Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:LITE) is one of the best performing AI stocks over the last 3 years, with a 3Y CAGR of 143.31%. On June 11, JPMorgan analyst Samik Chatterjee reiterated an Overweight rating and maintained a $1,130 price target, arguing that the recent pullback in optical-networking stocks had created a buying opportunity. Chatterjee said […]

headline: Big bank profit engines expected to roar into earnings as Main Street keeps spending
summary: Few examples better capture the resurgence of big banks than Jamie Dimon's special retention award, which has climbed in value from roughly $53 million five years ago to $280 million today.
